name: Amazon.com, Inc.
overview_text: Amazon.com, Inc. is a multinational technology company focusing on e-commerce, artificial intelligence, digital streaming, and cloud computing. It is one of the world's most valuable and powerful businesses.
headquarters_address: 410 Terry Avenue North, Seattle, WA 98109, USA

description: Amazon.com, Inc. is a multinational technology company focusing on e-commerce, artificial intelligence, digital streaming, and cloud computing. It is one of the world's most valuable and powerful businesses.
vision_statement: To be Earth's most customer-centric company, where customers can find and discover anything they might want to buy online.
mission_statement: To be the Earth's most customer-centric company where customers can find and discover anything they might want to buy online.
sales_motion: Amazon's sales motion is primarily B2B and B2C, with a focus on e-commerce, cloud computing, advertising, and artificial intelligence.
carbon_footprint: Amazon's carbon footprint is approximately 44.4 million metric tons of CO2e in 2020.
ethical_sourcing: Amazon has a commitment to responsible sourcing and has implemented various initiatives to ensure ethical sourcing practices.
benchmark_vs_peers: Amazon's revenue growth rate is 20% higher than its peers in the e-commerce industry.
sustainability_csr: Amazon has a strong commitment to sustainability and has set various goals to reduce its environmental impact.
crisis_behavior: Amazon has a reputation for handling crises effectively, with a focus on transparency and customer communication.
